scripts.dev: concurrently -n web,api -c cyan,magenta "npm run dev:frontend" "npm run dev:backend"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @viewbeforebuy/database && npm run build -w @viewbeforebuy/backend && npm run build -w @viewbeforebuy/frontend
scripts.start: concurrently -n web,api -c cyan,magenta "npm run start -w @viewbeforebuy/frontend" "npm run start -w @viewbeforebuy/backend"
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w @viewbeforebuy/frontend && npm run lint -w @viewbeforebuy/backend
scripts.test: npm run test -w @viewbeforebuy/backend && npm run test -w @viewbeforebuy/frontend
scripts.postinstall: npm run db:generate || echo Prisma generate skipped - run manually: npm run db:generate
